allow: Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 c:/Users/Dell/Desktop/code/venv/Scripts/python.exe -c " import asyncio, os from pathlib import Path from dotenv import load_dotenv load_dotenv\(Path\(''.''\).resolve\(\).parent / ''.env''\) from telethon import TelegramClient from xdg_base_dirs import xdg_state_home async def find\(\): session = xdg_state_home\(\) / ''mcp-telegram'' / ''session'' client = TelegramClient\(str\(session\), int\(os.getenv\(''API_ID''\)\), os.getenv\(''API_HASH''\)\) await client.connect\(\) async for dialog in client.iter_dialogs\(limit=30\): print\(f'' name={dialog.name!r:30s} username={getattr\(dialog.entity, ""username"", None\)!r:20s} id={dialog.id}''\) await client.disconnect\(\) asyncio.run\(find\(\)\) ")
